form.formComment: Last start 7th (Fr1) over 2138m after showing early pace at this track beaten 30 m by Fate Awaits (2:30.10) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better on April 4 at $34. Before that, 4th (Fr1) over 1660m at this track, beaten 5 m by Oakley Shard (1:55.90) in 3yo+ NR 49 to 55 on March 31 at $8.50. Can make an impact aided by the ace draw.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (20m Fr1) over 2200m at Marburg beaten 9 m by The Harris Hawk (2:47.70) in 4yo+ NR 40 to 70 on April 5 at $8.50. At his previous start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr6) over 1660m after being wide early at this track beaten 21 m by Applied (1:56.00) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better on March 28 at $81. Draws well so watch for a spike in form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up from 100m to finish and locked wheels momentarily at approximately 50m.
Had a tendency to pull hard in the score up and in the run.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start won by 2.25 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr1) at Marburg (2:15.90) beating Shes In Line in 3yo+ NR 49 to 54 on April 5 at $1.70. Racing well but this is tougher.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth after being driven well back, behind Applied at this track over 1660m in a 4yo+ NR 50 or better on March 28 at $151. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Martin Magic at Marburg over 2200m in a 4yo+ NR 40 to 70 on April 5 at $4.80. Has claims.

At the previous start 6th (Fr3) over 1660m at this track beaten 13 m by Applied (1:56.00) in 4yo+ NR 50 or better on March 28 at $18. With even luck from the back row he has winning claims.
